*Through December 31, 2026, David Yurman will donate to The Trevor Project 100% of the net proceeds from the sale of each Orange Rubber Bracelet ($16.40 for online purchases or $24.30 for in-store purchases) and 20% of the retail sale price from select styles. Minimum guaranteed donation: $50,000.

Cookies are in use on this site

{"list":{"owner":{"exists":false,"firstName":false,"lastName":false},"publicList":false,"UUID":"034d04c53a24b7279048655542","publicView":false,"pageNumber":1,"items":[],"type":10,"length":0,"showMore":false},"success":true}

Your Cookie Settings

We and our partners use cookies and other technologies on this site to collect data about your device and activities on this site for enabling and optimizing site functionality and tools, analyzing site usage, personalizing your experience, and targeting ads, as detailed in our Privacy Policy. Click “Accept All” to consent to all of this, “Reject All” to get only essential cookies, or “Cookie Preferences” for more options.

Cookie Preferences

Websites can store or retrieve information on your browser, including through cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences, or your device, and it may contain identifiers that are unique to you or to your device. We and third parties collect that kind of information through cookies in each category below. You can turn off most individual categories of cookies by moving the toggle to the left and clicking “Confirm My Choices” or turn them back on by moving it to the right and clicking that same button. This affects only your current browser on your current device when using DavidYurman.com. You must do this again if you clear your browser’s cookies, use a browser that automatically clears your cookies, or use a different browser or different device. You can revisit these choices later by clicking on “Cookie Preferences" in the footer.

Manage Consent Preferences

Functional (non-sale) Cookies

These cookies mainly enable enhanced functionality and personalization. They let us provide a more personalized and convenient experience. Disabling or removing these cookies may make browsing pages less convenient or may prevent certain functionality from working correctly. Functional cookies that qualify as a “sale” of personal data under certain US state privacy laws would be controlled by the Sale & Ad Targeting toggle, not this one.

Ad Targeting & Sale Cookies

These cookies may be used to target ads to you (such as by helping to build a profile of your interests to target ads), or they may be a Performance or Functional cookie that involves a “sale” of personal data as defined under certain US state privacy laws. If you do not allow these cookies, the advertising you experience may be more repetitive or less relevant to you.

Performance (non-sale) Cookies

Performance cookies mainly allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of webpages. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors use and interact with them. If you do not allow these cookies, we may have fewer ways to know when you have visited a page and may be less able to monitor their performance. Performance cookies that qualify as a “sale” of personal data under certain US state privacy laws are controlled by the Ad Targeting & Sale toggle, not this one.

Required (non-sale) Cookies

Always Active

These cookies cannot be turned off.
